name: FileMind
description: Structure-aware codebase navigation agent. Walks the file tree, follows imports, and answers questions about any GitHub repository — no embeddings, no stale RAG.

query.description: Run a structured investigation query against a local or remote codebase

stream.description: Stream investigation events (SSE) for live reasoning trace

import.description: Import a remote GitHub repository for querying

health.description: Health check — returns uptime and status
